name: tramstec
displayName: TramsTec — WhatsApp Memory & Business Context Infrastructure for LATAM
tagline: Persistent WhatsApp memory for AI agents · LATAM
description: MCP-native memory and business-context infrastructure for AI agents operating WhatsApp in Latin America. Six capability categories: messaging, memory, CRM intelligence, operations, payments, human handoff.

capability_categories.name: Messaging
capability_categories.description: Send and receive WhatsApp messages, templates, and media — with auto opt-out, 24h window handling, and approved-template fallback.

capability_categories.name: Memory & Context
capability_categories.description: Persistent per-customer conversational memory with semantic search via pgvector. Cross-conversation continuity.

capability_categories.name: CRM Intelligence
capability_categories.description: Automatic CRM enrichment, lead scoring, customer value identification, relationship intelligence — extracted from raw conversations.

capability_categories.name: Operations
capability_categories.description: Extract structured operational entities from free-form WhatsApp text: orders, commitments, follow-ups, deliveries.

capability_categories.name: Payments
capability_categories.description: LATAM-native payment rails: SPEI, OXXO, PIX, MercadoPago. CFDI 4.0 invoicing via Facturapi. Auto-reconciliation.

capability_categories.name: Human Handoff
capability_categories.description: Escalate to human operators with structured summaries, assign owners, manage workload across the team.

workflows.name: Retail order capture and payment
workflows.description: Customer asks for products in WhatsApp → agent extracts structured order → creates payment link → confirms when paid → notifies for delivery.

workflows.name: Sales follow-up across multiple conversations
workflows.description: Agent detects pending quotes, follows up at the right time, remembers what was discussed previously, escalates if customer goes silent.

workflows.name: Collections with stage-aware escalation
workflows.description: Agent tracks payment status, sends progressively firmer reminders, generates SPEI instructions, escalates to legal stage if needed.

workflows.name: Logistics and supplier coordination
workflows.description: Agent coordinates with suppliers via WhatsApp, tracks delivery commitments, confirms ETAs, raises alerts when commitments slip.

workflows.name: Inbound lead qualification and routing
workflows.description: New WhatsApp lead → agent extracts insights (vertical, budget, urgency) → scores → routes to right human team or schedules nurture sequence.

workflows.name: Mexico CFDI invoice on demand
workflows.description: Customer requests an invoice → agent validates RFC against SAT 69-B list → generates CFDI 4.0 via Facturapi → sends PDF via WhatsApp.
